assessor_raw: Single-pass evaluation of TFT vs LightGBM demand forecasting. Design strengths: explicit future covariate parity, Tobit imputation fit on training only, matched tuning effort, appropriate temporal split. Potential minor note: 3-month validation window is relatively short, but both models share this constraint. No asymmetric bias. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Single-pass evaluation of TFT vs LightGBM demand forecasting. Design strengths: explicit future covariate parity, Tobit imputation fit on training only, matched tuning effort, appropriate temporal split. Potential minor note: 3-month validation window is relatively short, but both models share this constraint. No asymmetric bias. Verdict: defense_wins.
